# mapbox_token (Data Source)

Use this data source to read information about an existing Mapbox access token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mapbox_token" "example" {
  id = "cilnk7n1y00opstl3g1qe4ick"
}

output "token_note" {
  value = data.mapbox_token.example.note
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the token to look up.

### Read-Only

- `allowed_urls` (List of String) A list of URLs that the token is restricted to.
- `created` (String) The ISO 8601 timestamp when the token was created.
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default token for the account.
- `modified` (String) The ISO 8601 timestamp when the token was last modified.
- `note` (String) A human-readable description of the token.
- `scopes` (Set of String) The set of scopes granted to the token.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The actual token string. This value is sensitive.
- `usage` (String) The token type: `pk` (public) or `sk` (secret).
